summary: Completed backend-only regression testing for PT. NURI DWI SUKSES API. 24/24 pytest tests passed covering public endpoints (root, stats, contact, blog), JWT auth (login + bearer + httpOnly cookie + /auth/me), admin inquiries CRUD, and admin blog CRUD with auto-incremented slugs. Verified protected endpoints reject unauthenticated requests with 401/403 and external preview URL is reachable.

minor.issue: Cookie attribute secure=False — acceptable for preview but should be True in production (HTTPS) to harden auth cookies.
CORS_ORIGINS='*' combined with allow_credentials=True is permissive; browsers reject credentialed wildcard, but for production set explicit origins.
No rate-limiting / captcha on public contact endpoint — risk of spam (out of scope for MVP but noted).
No brute-force lockout/throttle implemented (playbook expectation: 5-fail lockout). Not requested in features list but called out per playbook.

action_items: Optional: set cookie secure=True when behind HTTPS in production.
Optional: replace CORS_ORIGINS='*' with explicit production origins (required for credentialed CORS in real browsers).
Optional: add brute-force lockout for /api/auth/login per security playbook.
Optional: add basic rate limiting / honeypot on /api/contact to deter spam.
critical_code_review_comments: bcrypt password hashing correctly used; admin password is rehashed on startup if .env changes (good).
JWT correctly validates type='access' and expiry; both Bearer header and access_token cookie are supported in get_current_admin().
All Mongo queries exclude _id via projection — no ObjectId serialization issues.
Slug auto-increment loop is safe due to unique index on slug; collision falls back to -2, -3, ...
INITIAL_POSTS seeding gated by count==0 — non-idempotent if posts are partially deleted (acceptable for MVP).
Server file is 441 lines — still readable; would benefit from splitting into routers/models/auth modules if it grows further.
EmailStr Pydantic validation rejects malformed emails with 422 as expected.
seed_data_creation: Tests use TEST_ prefixed inquiries/blog posts and clean up after themselves via DELETE endpoints. Seeded admin user and 3 initial blog posts were verified present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green. Use /app/backend/tests/test_nuri_backend.py as the regression suite. External preview URL https://75651e36-2df5-4dc4-8e1c-63b401e9edc7.preview.emergentagent.com works for /api/*. Frontend was not tested in this iteration (skip-frontend per request).
